merchant.name: YÀN Atelier
merchant.description: Translucent enamel jewelry, fired by hand in Yunnan, China. Each piece undergoes 5-10 firings at 800°C. Plique-à-jour and cloisonné techniques.
merchant.description_cn: 云南手工珐琅首饰。每件作品经历 5-10 次 800°C 高温烧制。空窗珐琅与掐丝珐琅工艺。
merchant.return_policy: 14-day returns for standard pieces. Bespoke pieces: deposit transferable within 12 months.

products.title: Daisy Brooch
products.description: Sixteen petals, the enamel shading from translucent green to soft yellow — early summer light through a paper window. A pearl at the centre: the maker chose this one from three, the lustre warm enough not to overwhelm the bloom. Wearable as brooch or pendant — same design, two ways.
products.description_cn: 十六瓣花,空窗釉色由透绿渐黄,如初夏阳光透过窗纸。中心一颗淡水珍珠 —— 母亲挑了三颗才选定这一颗,她说,珠光要温,不能抢花的颜色。可作胸针或项链 —— 同款设计,两种穿戴。

products.title: Butterfly Brooch
products.description: Wings made in plique-à-jour, with no backing — held to the light, the blue is the colour of a summer afternoon sky. The body, an openwork silver filigree, sits so lightly it feels less worn than alighted. Wearable as brooch or pendant — same design, two ways.
products.description_cn: 空窗珐琅工艺翼,无衬底,迎光时蓝色釉料如夏日午后的天空。蝶身为镂空银花纹,极薄。可作胸针或项链 —— 同款设计,两种穿戴。

products.title: Ginkgo Leaf Brooch
products.description: Six ginkgo leaves in a circle, veined with wire-inlay. The green deepens from tip to stem — a tree caught just before the season turns. May be worn as brooch or ornament.
products.description_cn: 六片银杏叶围成一圈,叶脉以掐丝勾勒。绿色珐琅由叶尖至叶柄渐深,如秋未深时一棵尚未褪色的树。可作胸针,也可作衣饰。

products.title: Ginkgo Hair Pin · Pair
products.description: One blue, one green — together or apart. Two leaves at the head, with red agate and yellow amber as flower hearts; pearl tassels stir as you move.
products.description_cn: 一支蓝,一支绿,可分可合。簪头双叶交错,缀红玛瑙、黄蜜蜡花心,珠串流苏轻晃。
products.material: 925 silver, mineral enamel, freshwater pearls, agate, amber

products.title: Iris Bracelet
products.description: Six lattice windows in silver, each holding a single iris in wire-inlay enamel. Between the links, four-petalled clasps of red garnet; at the close, a carnelian teardrop. A Chinese garden window, worn at the wrist.
products.description_cn: 六格镂空银窗,每窗一朵紫兰,以掐丝填珐琅。链节间嵌红石榴石四瓣花扣,末端缀红玉髓水滴坠 —— 整件手镯如一扇小小的中式格窗,可戴于腕上。
products.material: 925 silver, mineral enamel, garnet, freshwater pearl

products.title: Iris Bracelet · Azure
products.description: The blue sister piece. The lotus clasp closes flush against the inside of the wrist — no bite. Buy two: one stays at home, one travels with her.
products.description_cn: 鸢尾的青色版。莲花扣合在腕内侧，贴肉，不硌。有人买两支 —— 一支在家，一支带着出门。
products.material: 925 silver, mineral enamel, agate, pearl, lotus clasp

products.title: Iris Bracelet · Dusk
products.description: The Iris in deep violet. Reads quiet under office light. Comes alive on a dim table — the moment the candles are lit.
products.description_cn: 鸢尾的暮色款。釉色偏深紫, 室内的暖灯下最沉。早上戴着开会不显, 下班那杯酒的桌上, 灯一调暗, 它就出来了。

products.title: Fish & Lotus Pendant
products.description: A traditional Chinese long-life lock, its face painted with koi among lotus — lián (lotus) plays on 'to connect, generation to generation'; yú (fish) on 'abundance.' The silk cord is hand-braided at the Yunnan studio. For an infant, an elder — or oneself, as a 'lock of coming-of-age.'
products.description_cn: 长命锁形制吊坠,锁面绘鱼与莲叶。绳结手编,可作婴礼、寿礼,也可作给自己的『成人之礼』。

products.title: Cloud Bangle · 福
products.description: Densely worked openwork silver, set with white-and-blue enamel clouds; at the centre, the character fú — 'fortune.' A piece the maker made for an elder's birthday, with the last of her most-loved batch of sapphire-blue pigment.
products.description_cn: 满工掐丝镂空,蓝白珐琅祥云纹缠绕,正中一枚『福』字 —— 这是母亲做给长辈寿辰的一件,釉料用了她最珍爱的那批宝石蓝矿石,据说当年只剩一小罐。

products.title: Butterfly Necklace
products.description: Wings fired in indigo enamel with openwork veins, two slender tassels behind. A collarbone chain rather than a pendant drop — at rest, the butterfly settles low, the tassels stirring as you move.
products.description_cn: 蝴蝶翼面以靛蓝渐变珐琅烧制,翼脉镂空,身后双流苏。锁骨链而非垂坠链,佩戴时蝶停胸前,流苏轻晃。

products.title: Cloud Bangle · Plain
products.description: The plain version of Cloud Bangle · 福 — no character, only the clouds. For those who do not show what they feel: the meaning held in the cloudwork, known only to the one who wears it.
products.description_cn: 云纹镯的素面款，没字，就剩云。那种不爱把话说在嘴上的人，戴这个挺合适。

products.title: Lotus Cord Bracelet
products.description: A blue enamel tube painted with two narcissi, braided at each end with silk. Adjustable — fitted from young girls to mothers. It has become, perhaps for that reason, the piece most often passed between three generations.
products.description_cn: 青底珐琅花管，画两枝水仙，两头编丝。大小可调，从小姑娘到妈妈都能戴 —— 经常看到奶奶买给孙女、女儿回赠妈妈这种。

products.description_cn: 三角 主纹 · 925 银 + 掐丝烧珐琅 · 滇韵手工坊烧制.
